name: Slimetrail
author: Bill Taylor (1992) / AGP port
description: Slimetrail (Bill Taylor, 1992). A single shared neutral marker (the snail) sits on an N x N board with two goal cells in opposite corners. Players alternate sliding the marker one king-step to an adjacent empty cell; the cell it leaves turns to 'slime' and can never be entered again. Whoever moves the marker onto a goal makes the owner of THAT goal win (player 0 = bottom-left, player 1 = top-right). A player who cannot move loses.
